results.title: Svechnikov scores in OT as Hurricanes beat Canadiens 3-2 in Game 3 of NHL East final

results.title: Aidiladha festive rush builds as traffic crawls into Kelantan
results.description: GUA MUSANG: Traffic heading into Kelantan via Gua Musang began building up on Tuesday (May 26) as more "balik kampung" travellers returned home ahead of Hari Raya Aidiladha.

results.title: Mercedes S-Class facelift to launch in India on June 15th
results.description: Mercedes S-Class facelift will come to India as a plug-in hybrid powertrain, on June 15th. A petrol powertrain is set to be added to the line later, though nothing is known about a diesel option for now.

results.title: Fifteenth-century frescoes in Swiss church to be conserved
results.description: The frescoes in the Church of Santa Maria del Castello in Mesocco, southeastern Switzerland, will be the subject of a study and conservation project developed in cooperation with the SUPSI Conservation and Restoration Course. +Get the most important news from Switzerland in your inbox The subject was the focus of an international conference held on May 22 and 23 in Soazza dedicated to the painting complex and its conservation. The main concern is the large fresco on the north-western wall of the church, which is now considered the top priority from a conservation point of view. The work, attributed to Lombard painters from the Seregnesi workshop and dating back to the 15th century, measures 4.80 metres by 12 metres. According to inspections carried out over the past few months, several signs of degradation emerged in the lower part of the painting, including salt efflorescence, lifting and detachment of the paint film, as well as possible biological phenomena and moisture-related ...

results.title: Marcos heads to Japan for four-day state visit
results.description: MANILA, Philippines — President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and First Lady Liza Araneta-Marcos left for Tokyo, Japan on Tuesday for a four-day state visit. The plane carrying Marcos, First Lady Liza Araneta-Marcos, and the rest of the Philippine delegation departed the Villamor Airbase in Pasay City at 1:36 p.m. Their estimated time of arrival at Haneda Airport is 6:15 p.m. (local time). This marks the President’s first state visit to the East Asian country. READ: Marcos, Sakaichi to raise Japanese arms imports in Tokyo state visit During the visit, the Philippines and Japan are expected to yield new agreements on defense, trade [...]... Keep on reading: Marcos heads to Japan for four-day state visit
